title: Industrial Machinery Mechanics
description: Repair, install, adjust, or maintain industrial production and processing machinery or refinery and pipeline distribution systems. May also install, dismantle, or move machinery and heavy equipment according to plans.

tasks.text: Repair or maintain the operating condition of industrial production or processing machinery or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Repair or replace broken or malfunctioning components of machinery or equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean, lubricate, or adjust parts, equipment, or machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Disassemble machinery or equipment to remove parts and make repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Reassemble equipment after completion of inspections, testing, or repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Examine parts for defects, such as breakage or excessive wear.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate newly repaired machinery or equipment to verify the adequacy of repairs.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Record parts or materials used and order or requisition new parts or materials, as necessary.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Observe and test the operation of machinery or equipment to diagnose malfunctions, using voltmeters or other testing devices.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Analyze test results, machine error messages, or information obtained from operators to diagnose equipment problems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Study blueprints or manufacturers' manuals to determine correct installation or operation of machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Cut and weld metal to repair broken metal parts, fabricate new parts, or assemble new equipment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Enter codes and instructions to program computer-controlled machinery.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Demonstrate equipment functions and features to machine operators.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
